name: mcp-exec
description: MCP server for sandboxed code execution with context window reduction

mcp-exec.description: Sandboxed code execution with MCP tool access

interface.shortDescription: Sandboxed code execution — keep MCP results out of context
interface.longDescription: Run MCP tool workflows in a sandboxed environment so only the final output returns to context. Reduces per-workflow token consumption by 80–95% on multi-tool tasks. Provides tools() for MCP catalog search and exec() for sandboxed Node/Bash/Python execution.
defaultPrompt: Search available MCP tools and run a workflow in the sandbox
Use exec() to fetch API docs without filling up context
Chain multiple MCP tool calls and return only the summary
